Robbie Moore MP

Robbie in Parliament

  • Tweet

As your local MP, Robbie Moore is in Parliament every week it sits, standing up for Keighley and Ilkley and fighting for more investment for our community. 

Below, you can see Robbie's speeches, as printed in Hansard.

Special Educational Needs Support | Women and Equalities | Commons debates

What steps the Government are taking to support children with SEND at school.

Special Educational Needs Support | Women and Equalities | Commons debates

Last week, I met Alice Jones, the headteacher of Oxenhope primary school, to talk about the funding challenges it is facing in supporting ch

Special Educational Needs Support | Women and Equalities | Commons debates

What steps the Government are taking to support children with SEND at school.

Special Educational Needs Support | Women and Equalities | Commons debates

Last week, I met Alice Jones, the headteacher of Oxenhope primary school, to talk about the funding challenges it is facing in supporting ch

Business of the House | Commons debates

Last July, my constituent Caroline decided to take out her civil service pension after 37 years working in the tax office in Shipley.

Mountain Rescue - [Emma Lewell in the Chair] | Westminster Hall debates

The hon. Member is making an excellent speech.

Mountain Rescue - [Emma Lewell in the Chair] | Westminster Hall debates

The hon. Member is making an excellent speech.

Wind Farms: Protected Peatland - [Sir Alec Shelbrooke in the Chair] | Westminster Hall debates

The reason for calling this debate is that we are dealing with a real and live challenge, particularly in my constituency and neighbouring c

Wind Farms: Protected Peatland - [Sir Alec Shelbrooke in the Chair] | Westminster Hall debates
